security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com https://github.com https://user-images.githubusercontent.com https://github.githubassets.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: GitHub Issues as your task list
bundle.longDescription: A menu-bar issue dashboard backed by GitHub. Define per-repo search queries as Sources; the app surfaces matching issues as your personal task list.
